title: porrum cepa
intro: Porrum cepa, also known as Allium cepa, is a plant species in the Amaryllidaceae family, commonly referred to as the onion. The medicinal properties of porrum cepa are attributed to its active compounds, including allyl sulfides and quercetin, which have been shown to possess anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of consuming porrum cepa include reducing the risk of cardiovascular disease, improving respiratory health, and supporting the immune system. Porrum cepa can be prepared in various herbal forms, including dried powder, capsules, and teas, which can be used to alleviate symptoms of colds, coughs, and other respiratory issues.
